# Entrectinib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Entrectinib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Entrectinib</strong> 目前有 <strong>27 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Entrectinib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Rozlytrek as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adult and paediatric patients 12 years of age and older with solid tumours expressing a neurotrophic tyrosine receptor kinase (NTRK) gene...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（98.6%）</li>
<li>amenorrhea (disease)（98.4%）</li>
<li>thrombocytopenia（98.1%）</li>
<li>cytomegalovirus infection（98.0%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（97.9%）</li>
<li>marcothrombocytopenia with mitral valve insufficiency（97.8%）</li>
<li>hereditary thrombocytopenia with normal platelets（97.8%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（97.8%）</li>
<li>transient neonatal thrombocytopenia（97.8%）</li>
<li>infectious bovine rhinotracheitis（97.7%）</li>
<li>malignant catarrh（97.7%）</li>
<li>myeloid leukemia（97.7%）</li>
<li>dense granule disease（97.7%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（97.5%）</li>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（97.4%）</li>
<li>thrombotic disease（97.0%）</li>
<li>hyperthyroidism（97.0%）</li>
<li>collagenopathy（96.6%）</li>
<li>lymphocytic hypereosinophilic syndrome（96.6%）</li>
<li>platelet storage pool deficiency（96.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/entrectinib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
